alt_text: Loon Mountain ski resort, New Hampshire - hero view of ski slopes
winter_signals: ski resort listing page on skiresort.info
notes: Primary source skiresort.info; fetch hero in stage-26. Major NH alpine resort, 73 trails, confirmed winter ski operation. Fallback: onthesnow.com/new-hampshire/loon-mountain/ski-resort.

The Loppet Foundation (Minneapolis) is a Nordic/XC cross-country ski venue with summer mountain biking - not an alpine ski resort. Not listed on skiresort.info or OnTheSnow as ski resort. REJECT for hero-image strategy; falls outside scope of alpine resort sources.

alt_text: Lutsen Mountains Minnesota - Lake Superior alpine view
notes: Largest MN alpine resort, 95 trails. Fallback: onthesnow.com/minnesota/lutsen-mountains/ski-resort.

Lyndon Outing Club is a small community alpine ski hill in VT (Lyndonville) - winter/alpine in nature, but NOT listed on any of the three required sources (skiresort.info / OnTheSnow / SnowBrains) due to small size. REJECT per strict-sourcing rule (cannot produce ≥2 verifiable winter signals from approved sites).

alt_text: View over the Sierra - Mammoth Mountain alpine panorama
winter_signals: Snow Depth Top: 318 cm at 3,369 m
Snow Depth Base: 104 cm at 2,424 m
Season: early November through early June
notes: VERIFIED via fetch 2026-05-12. Hero image confirmed at processed URL with alt text 'View over the Sierra'. 5 strong winter signals (cm snow depth, km slopes, lift count, season dates) on page.
